title: geocardia cordata
intro: Geocardia cordata, also known as Cordia cordata, is a plant species in the Buxaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. Geocardia cordata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
